full_text:
In-silico evaluation of tissue microarray performance for high grade serous ovarian cancer

‹#›

Background

Lin et al., 2023, Cell

‹#›

Background

Jerry's CRC paper mainly focused on autocorrelation of signal intensities. 
Which other biomarkers/features are relevant in HGSC?

Also, in the CRC, they analyzed a couple of samples. 
Can TMA recapture differences between cohorts? 

Are results in HGSC different from CRC?

‹#›

Research question

“Single-cell spatial dynamics of the tumor-immune microenvironment during neoadjuvant chemotherapy”

6 paired (n=12) whole slide image tCycif samples

Plus 9 samples PDS and 1 IDS

Plus TOPACIO, how many XXX?

‹#›

Materials

26 whole slide images from cohort 1 (Topacio)

22 whole slide images from cohort 2 (Finland-Sciset)

- A total of 48 whole slide images analyzed by tCycif

‹#›

Materials

26 whole slide images from cohort 1 (Topacio)

22 whole slide images from cohort 2 (Finland-Sciset)

- A total of 48 whole slide images analyzed by tCycif

CD11b, CD11c, CD15, CD163, CD1c, CD207, CD57, IBA1
CD20, CD3d, CD4, CD8a, FOXP3
CD31, SMA, Vimentin
CK7, E-cadherin, PAX8
cPARP, Cyclin A, Ki67, yH2AX, P21, cCasp
HLA-A, PD-L1, PD1, pSTAT1, pTBK1, STAT4, CD45RO

tCycif panel: 33 markers

CD11c, CD163, CD207, IBA1
CD20, CD4, CD8a, FOXP3
CD31, SMA, Vimentin, Desmin
CK7, E-cadherin
Ki67, pERK, HE4, TAZ, FOXOA3, SNAT1
MHCI, MHCII, pSTAT1, TIM3, CD45RO

tCycif panel: 26 markers

-Myeloid cells-

-Lymphocytes-

-Stromal cells-

-Cancer cells-

-Functional markers-

-Immune signaling-

‹#›

NACT induce dynamic changes in the cellular neighbourhoods

Preliminarily results

‹#›

Decreased Ki67, pSTAT1, SNAT1 postNACT in all neighborhoods

Increased TIM3 in macrophage rich neighborhoods, not in the T-cell rich neighborhoods postNACT

NACT induces global inactivation and spatially restricted exhaustion of CD8+T-cells in the myeloid/macrophage neighbourhoods

Neighbourhoods

Preliminarily results

‹#›

Tumor-stroma interphase: Enhanced pro-inflammatory immune cell infiltration after chemotherapy

Preliminarily results

‹#›

Speaker notes:
Cell proportions suggest immunogenicity

Research questions

An in silico TMA constructed from the tCycif whole slide images can allow us to get the same results?

How many cores are needed per slide?
What size of cores?

What type of cores are needed?
Cancer rich?
Cancer-stromal rich?
